annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under La. R.S. 13:4202 — 7.5% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Louisiana’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-01; verify at ofi.la.gov. Not legal advice.
